name: Marloes Peninsula
highlights: Wild peninsula with one of Wales' best beaches (Marloes Sands).
points_of_interest: Iron Age fort at Deer Park; Runwayskiln WWII airfield
picnic_spots: Marloes Sands grassy top; Martin's Haven
parking_start: Marloes village car park; Martin's Haven NT
food_drink_nearby: Lobster Pot Marloes; The Griffin Dale
hazards_notes: Paths close to cliff edges; seals at Martin's Haven
